Adults Christmas Reindeer Slippers
fields.description:
• Adults unisex novelty Christmas slippers.
  • Upper = Low plush pile, Sole = pin dot grip.

    For sizing in US and Australia please use outer sole measurements as a guide.

    Small is approx UK 3-4, EU 36-37, Outer sole length 9.5"
    Medium is approx UK 5-6, EU 38-39, Outer sole length 10"
    Large is approx UK 7-8, EU 40-41, Outer sole length 10.5"
    XL is approx UK 9-10, EU 43-44, Outer sole length 11"
    XXL is approx UK 11-12, EU 45-46, Outer sole length 11.5"

fields.name: Adults Clear Dome Umbrella
fields.description:
Clear dome umbrella with choice design.
Length when closed from tip to handle = 31" / 79cm
Diameter at widest part when open = 31" / 79cm
Depth of clear dome area = 14" / 35.5cm

fields.name: Adults Fleece Snood
Adults Fleece Snood
fields.description:
• Adjustable toggles allow to be tightened around the face.
  • Adults, one size fits all.
  • Made from 100% Polyester.

fields.name: Adults Mottled Soft Knit Peru - One Size
fields.description:
• Unisex knitted peru hat with mottled design.
  • Fleece Lined.
  • Pom pom top.
  • Fabric: Shell: 100% Acrylic, Lining: 100% Polyester.
  • One size : Adults.

fields.name: Adults Plain Flat Cap with Pre-formed Peak
fields.description:
•  Mens Adult Traditional Flat Cap.

  • Available in different colours: Beige, Grey, Black.

  • Available in different sizes: 57 cm, 58 cm, 59 cm, 60 cm.
  • 100% Polyester.
  • Inner Material: Cotton.
  • Fully Lined.
  • Vintage Look.
  • Measure around head just above ears to determine size.
  • Brand new and labelled with the original label.

fields.name: Adults Poncho One Size
fields.description:
Waterproof vinyl material.
Attached hood.
Lightweight and reusable.
Comepact and easy to carry.
One Size fits all.
Measurements - 132 x 101cm (52 x 40”).

fields.name: Adults Pull On Fleece Neck Warmer
fields.description:
• Fleece neck warmer.
  • Pull on over head design.
  • Adjustable toggle for a snug fit.
  • 100% Polyester.
  • Measures approx 26cm across / 52cm in diameter x 20cm high at deepest part.
  • Does stretch for pulling over head.
  • The perfect alternative to a scarf.
